commit.subject: LU-0000 tests: Pre-test of patch to add replay-dual to review-zfs-part-2 and review-dne-part-2 groups
commit.message:
LU-0000 tests: Pre-test of patch to add replay-dual to review-zfs-part-2 and review-dne-part-2 groups

This is for test only.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly trivial testlist=replay-single,sanity-quota,sanity-scrub,sanity-hsm,ost-pools,replay-ost-single,insanity,sanity-sec,large-scale,mds-survey,replay-dual \
clientdistro=el7 serverdistro=el7 osscount=1 ostcount=8 mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 clientcount=2 ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs

Change-Id: I967cf2e20feac6137e16510ed755b382f563c971
Signed-off-by: Jim Casper <jamesx.casper@intel.com>
